overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city street in Night City. The player walks along a covered commercial sidewalk, passes under a massive elevated highway overpass, and navigates through the complex concrete architecture while holographic advertisements illuminate the skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial sidewalk with neon storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath building overhangs, passing various neon-lit storefronts and advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing white jacket with black X symbol walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: bright red neon sign with white OPEN text mounted on storefront window
tall skyscraper covered in large digital billboards and holographic advertisements displaying various products
green metal safety railing separating the pedestrian sidewalk from the multi-lane street
building front with multiple shop entrances, neon signage, and illuminated window displays

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered commercial sidewalk in a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. The camera moves forward past a prominent red neon OPEN sign and various storefronts with cyan and purple lighting. To the right, a green metal railing separates the walkway from the street where sparse traffic passes by. In the distance, a massive skyscraper covered in holographic advertisements dominates the skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching elevated highway intersection with dense urban infrastructure

events.description: entering the covered area beneath the massive elevated highway overpass structure

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the sidewalk as the environment transitions toward the highway overpass intersection

entered.detail: massive elevated concrete and steel highway with multiple levels and support pillars looming ahead

segments.scene_description: As the camera progresses, the commercial storefronts give way to an approaching highway overpass. The massive concrete structure of the elevated roadway becomes the dominant feature, with its support pillars and undercarriage becoming visible. The holographic advertising tower shifts to the left as the perspective changes, and the environment becomes more industrial with exposed concrete and steel beams.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass beneath elevated highway with complex concrete architecture

events.description: camera pans upward to observe the underside of the highway structure and its lighting

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass while looking up at the concrete infrastructure and observing the neon lighting overhead

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving under the overpass from right to left

entered.detail: thick cylindrical concrete pillars supporting the massive weight of the elevated roadway above
linear cyan and white fluorescent lights mounted along the underside of the overpass illuminating the underpass

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place entirely beneath the elevated highway overpass. The camera moves through the underpass, revealing the complex concrete architecture of support pillars and ramps overhead. Linear neon strip lights illuminate the underside of the bridge with a cyan glow. The ground transitions to asphalt as the path crosses under the highway, and vehicles occasionally pass through the underpass. The camera pans upward to examine the industrial infrastructure before continuing forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a vibrant commercial sidewalk into the industrial depths of a massive highway underpass. It begins by gliding past neon-lit storefronts and a prominent red open sign, with a green metal railing separating the walkway from the street and a holographic skyscraper looming in the distance. As the camera progresses, the colorful shops fade away and the environment shifts toward exposed concrete and steel beams as the massive structure of an elevated roadway begins to dominate the view. The scene then transitions entirely beneath the overpass, where the path turns to asphalt and linear cyan neon strips illuminate the complex architecture of support pillars and overhead ramps. Finally, the camera pans upward to examine the heavy industrial infrastructure before continuing its journey through the dim, concrete corridor.
